title: wasm-posix-kernel binaries.lock
description: Pins the repo to a specific binaries release. Checked into git; updated deliberately, not auto-refreshed.

abi_version.description: Must match the running kernel's `__abi_version` export. Fetcher + tests compare; mismatch is a hard error.

release_tag.description: GitHub release tag the fetcher targets.

manifest_sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the release's manifest.json. Fetcher verifies on download; mismatch is a hard error.
